```bash
kubectl get pods -n atlantis -l app.kubernetes.io/name=atlantis
helm list -n atlantis 2>/dev/null || echo "Not installed via Helm"
```
This feature requires a working atlantis installation."

+        "title": "Review atlantis configuration",
+        "description": "Inspect the relevant atlantis configuration:
```bash
kubectl get all -n atlantis -l app.kubernetes.io/name=atlantis
kubectl get configmap -n atlantis -l app.kubernetes.io/part-of=atlantis
```
### Community Note

- **Please vote on this issue** by adding a 👍 [reaction](https://blog.github.com/2016-03-10-add-reactions-to-pull-requests-issues-and-comments/) to the original issue to help the community and maintainers prioritize this"

+        "title": "Apply the fix for Support Forgejo / Gitea webhooks",
+        "description": "## what

Addition of Gitea client in order to close #3538

A functionally complete implementation of a client for Gitea, with the sole exception being the listing of teams that a user is a member of. However, that's not uncommon for other clients.

It was tested manually against both a Gitea and a

+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Verify the feature works",
+        "description": "Test that the new capability is working as expected:
```bash
kubectl get pods -n atlantis -l app.kubernetes.io/name=atlantis
kubectl get events -n atlantis --sort-by='.lastTimestamp' | tail -10
```
Confirm the feature described in "Support Forgejo / Gitea webhooks" is functioning correctly."
+      }

+    "resolution": {
+      "summary": "## what

Addition of Gitea client in order to close #3538

A functionally complete implementation of a client for Gitea, with the sole exception being the listing of teams that a user is a member of. However, that's not uncommon for other clients.

It was tested manually against both a Gitea and a Forgejo install. Automated tests were limited to the basics.",
+      "codeSnippets": [
+        "// code taken from go-github

func NewEnterpriseClient(baseURL, uploadURL string, httpClient *http.Client) (*Client, error) {
	baseEndpoint, err := url.Parse(baseURL)
	if err != nil {
		return nil, err
	}

	if !strings.HasSuffix(baseEndpoint.Path, "/") {
		baseEndpoint.Path += "/"
	}
	if !strings.HasSuffix(baseEndpoint.Path, "/api/v3/") &&
		!strings.HasPrefix(baseEndpoint.Host, "api.") &&
		!strings.Contains(baseEndpoint.Host, ".api.") {
		baseEndpoint.Path += "api/v3/"
	}

	if err != nil {
		return nil, err
	}

	if !strings.HasSuffix(uploadEndpoint.Path, "/") {
		uploadEndpoint.Path += "/"
	}
